result.stdout:
Description:
  Razor file formatter for Blazor projects

Usage:
  RazorFormatter [options]

Options:
  -i, --in <in> (REQUIRED)           Input .razor file path
  -o, --out <out>                    Output .razor file path (if not specified, overwrites input file)
  -c, --check                        Check if the file is formatted without writing changes [default: False]
  --indent-size <indent-size>        Number of spaces for indentation [default: 4]
  --use-tabs                         Use tabs instead of spaces for indentation [default: False]
  --max-attributes <max-attributes>  Maximum number of attributes per line before splitting [default: 3]
  --version                          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information
